zh.lifeSummary: 當Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg於大約1203年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海斯格海斯格時，她的父親Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg15歲，母親Isolda van Limburg15歲。她與Arnoud II heer van Heusden結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1254年7月15日享年52歲。

meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Mechtild
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg was born about 1203, in Heinsberg, Heinsberg, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, her father, Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg, was 15 and her mother, Isolda van Limburg, was 15. She married Arnoud II heer van Heusden. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 15 July 1254, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg est née environ 1203, à Heinsberg, Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Isolda van Limburg, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Arnoud II heer van Heusden. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 juillet 1254, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg um 1203 in Heinsberg, Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg 15 und ihre Mutter Isolda van Limburg 15. Sie hat Arnoud II heer van Heusden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. Juli 1254 im Alter von 52 Jahren.

Lei sposato Arnoud II heer van Heusden. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 15 luglio 1254, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsbergが約1203年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンヘインスバーグヘインスバーグで生まれた時，父Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburgは15歳，母Isolda van Limburgは15歳であった。Arnoud II heer van Heusdenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1254年7月15日に52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg(이)가 대략 1203년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 하인스버그 하인스버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isolda van Limburg(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 Arnoud II heer van Heusden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1254년 7월 15일 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg родилась около 1203 г. в местности хаинсбирг, хаинсбирг, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, её отцу по имени Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Isolda van Limburg, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Arnoud II heer van Heusden. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 15 июля 1254 г. в возрасте 52 лет.
